feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: /ffpg/ - Free as in Freedom Phone General
entry.content: Discard the botnet, acquire privacy. Apple iPhones and iOS are the biggest 1984 Orwellian dystopia surveillance botnet on earth and track everything you do, with Google coming in a close second. If you LARP as caring abot privacy while still using spyPhone and spyOS or stock android, you're a hypocrite with zero privacy. >Step 1: Find a supported phone (beware carrier variants with locked bootloaders) >Step 2: Install a ROM without Gapps if possible https://wiki.lineageos.org/devices https://iod

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: why am i supposed to be mad, again?
entry.content: the gabecube is a starter PC sold at the price that you'd be able to buy all the parts for, meant for people who want to get into PC but have no clue what they should be looking for and dont want to carry the risk of making a prebuilt. it can be used exactly like a PC, and isnt locked to steam's software. you could even install another OS on it and uninstall steamOS if you wanted. for people that already have a proper PC, its intended to fill a role of portability while not being as weak as a ha

entry.title: /b/ Random: May God Almighty, creator of heaven and earth, through his only son our Lord Jes…
entry.content: May God Almighty, creator of heaven and earth, through his only son our Lord Jesus Christ, bless the Malkhuth, Yesod, Hod, Netzach, Tifereth, Daath, Kether, Binah, Geburah, Hesed, and Hokhmah of your tree of life. Amen Shalom, Pax, Salam! Peace be with you always! May God favor you all the day's of your life! May you live Heh, and your Khat, Ba, Ren, Ka, Shuyet, Jb, Akh, and Sahu ascend heavenward at all times! Amenhotep

entry.content: >I was in a "favorite person" position, I'm out of it now and it's been about 2 years since I had any "real" conversation with her. >10 months ago they very directly did something I'm assuming was to grab my attention. >I didn't see it, I never knew >I only looked recently because I spiraled.(compounding health issues, bad environment) >She posted it on bluesky(platform where you can't see shit from those that blocked you) >we have each other mutually blocked everywhere >For some reason they pos

entry.title: /int/ International: Anal sex
entry.content: How is anal sex perceived in your country? I'll begin: >Japan Anal is "weird", but only because it is considered unhygienic and dirty. It's said that only hentai old men want it. Therefore, the ratio of anal:vaginal sex representation in national porn is really small (maybe 1:25) compared to Western porn (maybe 1:3). Also, people here use "anal/アナル" to refer to the anus, instead of using the word as an adjective.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: There are people who hate everything about Megaman Battle Network other than its…
entry.content: There are people who hate everything about Megaman Battle Network other than its combat. They hate the two protagonists-two worlds system, they hate the chip collection, they especially hate the zany stories that don't do any harm. I mean, I get that the games are definitely flawed, but do they really deserve that much hate?

entry.content: >Star Fox SNES: SuperFX Chip >Star Fox 64: Rumble Pak >Star Fox 64 3D: Glasses-free 3D effect >Star Fox Command/Zero: Dual-screen capabilities Star Fox 2026: VR Avatar features and adopting the use of AI-generated voice acting How would people feel if this is why the voice acting is so flat? After hearing the dialogue so far, I'm not really doubting it at this point.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Anyone played The First Descendant? wondering how the gameplay is
entry.content: Anyone played The First Descendant? wondering how the gameplay is

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >play game for ~20 hours >having fun, but get burned out >take a break for 2 wee…
entry.content: >play game for ~20 hours >having fun, but get burned out >take a break for 2 weeks >try to get back into the game >don't remember the inputs >quit and never try it again Seriously am I the only one that does this way too often? I quit Stellar Blade and RDR2 because of this.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: 4K 60 FSR
entry.content: you’re supposed to use SteamOS’ built-in system level FSR upscaler to achieve 4K 60. not the game’s in-engine FSR option. just something I’ve noticed every single reviewer just not understand or use correctly

entry.content: Finally building a pc soon before prices can get any worse. I need some advice on ram kits and their latency: KLEVV FIT V 32GB (2 X 16GB) DDR5 CL28 6000Mhz Kingston Fury Beast 64GB DDR5 2x 32GB 6000MT/s CL36 wat do bros?

entry.content: uck

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Carly Rae Jepsen Announces Double Album ‘Day and Night’
entry.content: Releasing September 18 via Interscope Records. The album will be divided into “Day” and “Night” sections, each of which will have 12 songs. According to a release, “Day” is “organic and raw, with live instrumentation and hints of ’70s-inspired psychedelic pop.” “Night” is “exploratory and intense, shifting into a sleek, synth-driven world of dance pop.”

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Damn, this is really sad. It makes me think about my own interactions with Anons…
entry.content: Damn, this is really sad. It makes me think about my own interactions with Anons over the years, and some that really wanted to push more with me but I rejected(ignored) them. I always viewed "online friends" as invalid and pathetic, but I sometimes wonder if something could have burgeoned between Anon and I even if it is just exchanging pleasantries, stories, or books. I would just blankly stare at monitor whenever an Anon called me a friend. Then a defensive instinct would overcome and my shou

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Umm...
entry.content: If the retail SSD market is dead, why is the 4TB SN850X $1,000 off MSRP? The 8TB version is almost $2,000 below MSRP too.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: my forza game started freezing when I was using 48 GB RAM, but that should be fi…
entry.content: my forza game started freezing when I was using 48 GB RAM, but that should be fine anyway as I still have more. But my question here now is - why does windows use over 40 GB RAM? I know I got bloatware but that's why I have 64 gigs so I don't have to care
